executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: External owner-loop residue: marketing independent verification is stale/fail (3290+ min), docs verifier is fail (28 consecutive failures, independent stop missing). All architecture-owned gates are green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce measurable primary-repo outcome evidence and rerun independent verification; docs owner loop must resolve independent-stop-signoff mismatch.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: ENOSPC disk-space errors RESOLVED since last watchdog run
findings.mechanism: Previous runs (ralph-docs-supervisor-precheck, competitor-analysis, marketing-churn-watchdog) showed ENOSPC on write. Live disk shows 40% used (250GB free). Live cron topology shows 0 last-error jobs. The health_monitor artifact from 22:06 still carries stale ENOSPC entries but live state is clean.
findings.root_cause: Disk space freed between last health_monitor run (22:06) and current watchdog run.
findings.recommended_fix: No fix needed. ENOSPC is resolved.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification is fail/stale
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is fail and ~3290 minutes stale (max 240). Primary-repo adoption remains measurement-pending. Reddit and Apollo channels blocked.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing; distribution-to-conversion bottleneck persists.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun independent verification.

findings.title: Docs verifier is fail with independent stop missing
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier verdict is 'fail' with 28 consecutive failures, 99 total. Candidate pass reached but independent stop approval is missing — signoff fingerprint does not match current docs state.
findings.root_cause: Docs verifier loop requires independent-stop signoff. Fingerprint mismatch indicates docs state diverged since last approved stop.
findings.recommended_fix: Docs owner loop must resolve the independent-stop-signoff fingerprint mismatch and produce a pass artifact.

findings.title: Live Gateway cron topology is clean
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 21 jobs, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last-error. The previous 19 disabled stale jobs have been cleaned up.
findings.root_cause: Cron topology cleanup already completed; runtime state is coherent.
evidence_refs: openclaw cron list --json: 21 total, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 error
findings.recommended_fix: No fix needed. Topology is clean.

findings.title: Architecture-owned gates are all green
findings.mechanism: Checker=AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, independent_verify=qualified_pass, verifier=ok with no errors. All architecture-owned verification paths pass independently.
findings.root_cause: Architecture loop is healthy and self-verifying.
findings.recommended_fix: No fix needed. Architecture loop is healthy.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable primary-repo outcome evidence and rerun independent verification
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing independent verification is the longest-stale external blocker (~3290 min). Until resolved, whole-stack certification is blocked.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Docs owner loop must resolve independent-stop-signoff mismatch and produce pass artifact
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Docs verifier has 28 consecutive failures with 99 total. Independent stop is the gating issue.
